title: Mastering SMILE: Precision Parameters & Clinical Protocol
summary: Small Incision Lenticule Extraction (SMILE) represents the current apex of refractive surgery, utilizing femtosecond laser technology to create an intrastromal lenticule. This guide optimizes the critical parameters for consistent clinical outcomes in myopia and astigmatism correction.

data.title: Mastering SMILE: Precision Parameters & Clinical Protocol
data.summary: Small Incision Lenticule Extraction (SMILE) represents the current apex of refractive surgery, utilizing femtosecond laser technology to create an intrastromal lenticule. This guide optimizes the critical parameters for consistent clinical outcomes in myopia and astigmatism correction.

rows: Thicker cap increases stability, thinner allows more stromal bed.
Larger diameter minimizes halos, smaller saves tissue.
Balanced against ablation depth; larger = better night vision.
Density for smooth interface; lower = smoother.
Higher density for sharper edge definition.

sections.title: Red Flags: Pre-operative Screening
content: Forme Fruste Keratoconus (Belin-Ambrosio Ectasia Display D > 1.6)

sections.title: Surgical Workflow Process
content: Step 1: Docking & Centration (Fixation on target light).
Step 2: Femtosecond laser creation of posterior lenticule surface.
Step 3: Creation of anterior lenticule surface & side cut.
Step 4: Creation of the 2-4mm superior access incision.
Step 5: Lenticule dissection using micro-dissector (SMILE spatula).
Step 6: Lenticule removal with McPherson forceps.

sections.title: Remember the 5 S's of SMILE Success

content.explanation: S-uction (ensure stable), S-pacing (optimized laser energy), S-patula (gentle dissection), S-urface (avoid epithelial trauma), S-tability (monitor refractive drift).

sections.title: Key Clinical Pearls
content: Maintain docking suction for the full duration (approx 25-30s).
Avoid excessive irrigation during extraction to prevent epithelial ingrowth.
If suction loss occurs: abort and convert to PRK if incomplete; restart if early.
Wait 3 months before enhancement (PRK is the standard rescue).
Always account for cyclotorsion compensation in toric SMILE.
